description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bubble tea cup with a transparent body, allowing a clear view of the drink inside. The cup is filled with a creamy, light brown liquid and contains numerous dark, spherical tapioca pearls settled at the bottom. A flat, red lid sits securely on top, featuring a central opening through which a wide, straight red straw is inserted. The straw is made of plastic and is designed to easily draw up the tapioca pearls along with the drink. The cup appears unbranded, with no visible logos or printed designs, and the overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for takeaway or casual urban consumption.
description: A tall, transparent bubble tea cup with a red lid and wide red straw, filled with a creamy drink and dark tapioca pearls at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent cup, red lid, and wide red straw, with tapioca pearls clearly visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the central placement of the straw and the even distribution of tapioca pearls.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the cylindrical shape of the cup and the visibility of the drink's swirls and pearls.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the cup, with the red lid and straw still prominent and the pearls visible through the transparent cup.
attribute_straw_type: wide, straight, red plastic straw with a smooth surface, designed for tapioca pearls
attribute_cup_lid_style: flat plastic lid with a central straw slot
